channel.title: Kernel on Waheyyyyyyy
channel.description: Recent content in Kernel on Waheyyyyyyy

item.title: Procrastination is my salvation - msg_msg exploitation
item.description:
Introduction:

In my never-ending quest to do literally anything but schoolwork, I’ve gone back into the beautiful kpwn grind. I solved 3 challenges and will continue to procrastinate by posting writeups about them whenever I can, with the first challenge being Fire Of Salvation.

Table of Contents:

  1. Vulnerability Analysis
  2. Protections
  3. msg_msg stuff
  4. exploitation

Vulnerability Analysis:

This is a classic challenge which was my introduction into AAW and AAR with the msg_msg struct.

item.title: AYCEP2025 verysecretstorage Modprobe Path overwrite
item.description:
Introduction:

WHATS’S UP GUYS! Welcome back to another text based youtube video. Today we will be reading a writeup about verysecretstorage, a challenge made by Kaligula for AYCEP2024 (yes I am a year late and missed out greatly). This was my first kernel heap challenge as well as my first real kernel challenge and it was pretty fun.

Table of Contents:

  1. Protections
  2. Binary analysis
  3. Exploit

Protections:

Since this is my first kpwn challenge I will be going through the common protections as well as the ones that people do not talk about often in beginner writeups (in my exp pls no sue me).
